scope: Pass B full-surface expansion: 10 read streams (the wave2 legacy-parity jobs stream plus candidates, job_applications, departments, locations, roles, stages, teams, users, regions) and 9 write actions covering job/candidate/job-application/department/location/team/todo/note create-update mutations. Excluded: the ~90-endpoint remaining JSON:API catalog (activities/answers/audit-events/custom-fields/custom-field-values-options-selects/divisions/forms-form-questions-form-answers/interviews/job-offers/movements/notification-settings/nps-responses/onboardings/partner-results/picked-questions/questions/referrals/reject-reasons/requisitions/requisition-step-verdicts/scorecard-criteria-picks-scores/stage-types/team-memberships/triggers/uploads/company) as out-of-scope breadth-vs-cost triage; every write body is Teamtailor's JSON:API envelope {"data": {"type", "attributes", "relationships"}}, modeled by declaring the record itself as that envelope shape (the engine's body_type:json construction sends record fields verbatim, so a record whose one top-level key IS "data" produces the exact JSON:API body the live API requires - no engine change needed, same pattern as bitly's nested destination object).

excluded.reason: single-job detail; identical record shape to the jobs list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
job field update; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage, create_job already covers job-creation parity
single-candidate detail; identical record shape to the candidates list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-job-application detail; identical record shape to the job_applications list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-department detail; identical record shape to the departments list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
department field update; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage, create_department already covers department-creation parity
